allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path @\('agent.html', 'admin.html', 'js/agent.js', 'js/admin.js', 'css/admin.css', 'css/styles.css', 'pages/apply.html', 'pages/contact.html'\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const t = fs.readFileSync\('js/translations.js', 'utf8'\); eval\(t.replace\(/if \\\(typeof module.*$/ms, ''\)\); console.log\('EN keys:', Object.keys\(translations.en\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('AR keys:', Object.keys\(translations.ar\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Test EN courses.heroTitle:', translations.en.courses.heroTitle\); console.log\('Test AR courses.heroTitle:', translations.ar.courses.heroTitle\); console.log\('Test EN nav.login:', translations.en.nav.login\); console.log\('Test AR nav.login:', translations.ar.nav.login\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('js/translations.js', 'utf8'\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('Syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('Syntax error:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const code = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('js/translations.js','utf8'\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('Syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('SYNTAX ERROR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(echo "- [Horizons Stitch Design System]\(horizons_stitch_design_system.md\) — Color palette, CSS classes, hero image system, layout patterns")

PowerShell($courses = Get-Content -Path "C:\\Users\\abasm\\Desktop\\AL-Mokadam-Educational-agency-main\\AL-Mokadam-Educational-agency-main\\data\\imports\\generated\\courses.generated.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Total courses: $\($courses.Count\)"; $courses[0..15] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2)

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); console.log\('Total courses:', c.length\); console.log\('\\nFirst 10:'\); c.slice\(0,10\).forEach\(\(x, i\) => console.log\(i+1, x.name, '→', x.category, '\('+x.level+'\)'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const names = {}; const dups = []; c.forEach\(x => { const key = x.name.toLowerCase\(\); names[key] = \(names[key] || 0\) + 1; }\); Object.entries\(names\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v > 1\).slice\(0,15\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(v+'x:', k\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); console.log\('Total courses:', c.length\); const dups = {}; c.forEach\(x => { const k = x.name.toLowerCase\(\); dups[k] = \(dups[k] || 0\) + 1; }\); const dupsFound = Object.entries\(dups\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v > 1\); console.log\('\\nDuplicates found:', dupsFound.length\); dupsFound.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(v+'x:', k\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const bad = c.find\(x => x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('financial informatics'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(bad, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const name = 'Diploma in Financial Informatics'.toLowerCase\(\); console.log\('Name:', name\); console.log\('Match financial informatics:', /financial informatics/.test\(name\)\); console.log\('Match informatics:', /informatics/.test\(name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const bad = c.find\(x => x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('financial informatics'\)\); console.log\('Name:', bad.name\); console.log\('Category:', bad.category\); console.log\('Price:', bad.basePrice\); console.log\('Level:', bad.level\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const cats = {}; c.forEach\(x => { cats[x.category] = \(cats[x.category] || 0\) + 1; }\); console.log\('Category distribution:'\); Object.entries\(cats\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b[1] - a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\('  ' + k + ': ' + v\)\); console.log\('\\nCourseId examples \(first 5\):'\); c.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(x => console.log\('  ' + x.courseId\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const o = require\('./data/imports/generated/offerings.generated.json'\); console.log\('Course validation:'\); const bad = c.filter\(x => !x.courseId || !x.name || typeof x.basePrice !== 'number' || typeof x.totalSemesters !== 'number'\); console.log\('  Invalid courses:', bad.length\); console.log\('  Sample offering:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(o[0], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const o = require\('./data/imports/generated/offerings.generated.json'\); const s = o[0]; console.log\('Sample offering with correct types:'\); console.log\('  durationYears type:', typeof s.durationYears, '\(value:', s.durationYears, '\)'\); console.log\('  durationMonths type:', typeof s.durationMonths, '\(value:', s.durationMonths, '\)'\); console.log\('  nextIntakeDate type:', typeof s.nextIntakeDate, '\(value:', s.nextIntakeDate, '\)'\); console.log\('  semesters type:', typeof s.semesters, '\(value:', s.semesters, '\)'\); console.log\('  intakeMonths type:', typeof s.intakeMonths, '\(length:', s.intakeMonths.length, '\)'\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const dbs = c.filter\(x => x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('diploma in business'\)\); console.log\('Diploma in Business courses:'\); dbs.forEach\(x => console.log\('  Name:', x.name\); console.log\('  ID:', x.courseId\); console.log\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const dbs = c.filter\(x => x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('diploma in business'\)\); console.log\('Diploma in Business courses:'\); dbs.forEach\(x => { console.log\('  Name:', x.name\); console.log\('  ID:', x.courseId\); console.log\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const bus = c.filter\(x => x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('bachelor of business'\) && !x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('online'\)\); console.log\('Bachelor of Business \(non-online\) courses:'\); bus.slice\(0,6\).forEach\(x => { console.log\(x.name\); console.log\('  → ' + x.courseId\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./data/imports/generated/courses.generated.json'\); const ids = {}; let dups = 0; c.forEach\(x => { const id = x.courseId; ids[id] = \(ids[id] || 0\) + 1; }\); Object.entries\(ids\).forEach\(\([id, count]\) => { if \(count > 1\) { dups++; console.log\(dups + '. ' + id + ': ' + count + ' courses'\); } }\); console.log\('\\nTotal courses:', c.length\); console.log\('Unique IDs:', Object.keys\(ids\).length\); console.log\('Duplicates:', dups\);")
